explicit_text: I was a Vietnam Era veteran, though I never served in Vietnam myself. My brother was in the Army and volunteered to go to Vietnam before I enlisted. When I graduated from training in early 1969, many of my fellow soldiers were sent to Vietnam, but my orders were eventually changed and I was sent to Korea instead. The Vietnam War was the backdrop of my military service and influenced many aspects of my experience.
